title: About Us - BookMyTM - Trademark & ISO Services in Kerala
h1: About BookMyTM: Guardians of Your Brand

blocks.text: About BookMyTM: Guardians of Your Brand
Get a Free Consultation
Welcome to BookMyTM
Welcome to BookMyTM, India’s premier digital platform for Intellectual Property protection, Business Registration, and Corporate Compliance.

Headquartered in the vibrant heart of Kochi, Kerala, with a strategic corporate presence in New Delhi, BookMyTM was born from a singular, powerful vision: To democratize legal protection for every entrepreneur in India.

We believe that every business—whether it is a heritage spice exporter in Idukki, a tech startup in Trivandrum’s Technopark, or a home-baker in Calicut—deserves the same level of brand protection and corporate structure as a multinational conglomerate. We exist to bridge the gap between complex legal statutes and the practical needs of modern business owners.
Our Story: From Compliance to Strategy

In the traditional landscape of Indian business services, entrepreneurs often faced a fragmented reality. You had to visit a lawyer for trademarks, a Chartered Accountant for company registration, and a separate consultant for ISO certification. The process was opaque, expensive, and riddled with jargon.
BookMyTM changed the narrative.

We integrated these silos into a single, seamless, technology-driven ecosystem. We realized early on that a "Trademark" isn't just a certificate; it's the commercial soul of a business. An "ISO Certification" isn't just a badge; it's a promise of quality to the customer.

By combining the expertise of Trademark Attorneys, Company Secretaries, Chartered Accountants, and ISO Lead Auditors under one digital roof, we transformed from being a service provider to a Strategic Business Partner. Today, we don't just file forms; we build the legal fortresses that allow your business to scale without fear.
Why Kerala Trusts BookMyTM
While we serve clients across the length and breadth of India, our roots in Kerala define our ethos. We understand the unique pulse of "God's Own Country."

We know that a Gold Retailer in Thrissur faces different brand threats than a Houseboat Operator in Alappuzha. We understand that an Ayurvedic Manufacturer needs specialized help to navigate "descriptive" trademark objections that generic automated services often miss.
Being Kerala’s Top Trademark & ISO Provider means we offer the "Best of Both Worlds":
Local Accessibility
Our Kochi office ensures you have a partner who speaks your language, understands the local market dynamics, and is accessible when you need us.
National Influence
Our New Delhi office places us right at the doorstep of the central ministries and registries, ensuring your applications move smoothly through the bureaucratic corridors of the capital.
A 360-Degree Business Shield
BookMyTM is designed to support your business at every stage of its lifecycle—from Birth to Growth, and even through Transformation.
Intellectual Property: Protecting Your Identity
Your brand is your most valuable asset. Our core expertise lies in securing it against theft and infringement.

Trademark Services: We handle the entire lifecycle. From the initial Trademark Search and Registration to complex legal battles like Trademark Opposition, Rectification, and Show Cause Hearings. We also manage Trademark Renewals to keep your legacy alive and Trademark Licensing/Assignment to help you monetize your brand.
Copyright & Design: Whether it’s software code, artistic logos, or industrial designs, we ensure your creative outputs remain exclusively yours.
Patent Services: For the innovators, we offer Patent Search, Provisional, and Permanent Patent Registration, safeguarding your inventions from the moment of conception.
ISO Certification: Validating Your Quality
In a global marketplace, trust is currency. We help Kerala’s businesses prove their world-class standards through our hassle-free ISO certification services.
Quality & Safety: We certify you for ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management) and ISO 45001:2018 (Occupational Health & Safety).

Sector Specifics: For our food industry clients, we provide ISO 22000:2018 (Food Safety), and for the IT sector, ISO 27001:2013 (Information Security). We also handle ISO 14001:2015 for environmental compliance.
Business Registration: Giving Birth to Entities
The right structure prevents future liability. We guide you in choosing and registering the perfect legal entity.
Proprietorship Firm Registration and One Person Company (OPC).
Partnership Firm Registration and Limited Liability Partnership (LLP).
Private Limited Company Registration and Public Limited Company Registration.
Section 8 Company (NGOs) and Nidhi Company Registration.
Statutory Compliance & ROC Filing: Keeping You Legal
Compliance is not optional. We take the headache out of statutory filings so you can focus on sales.
Tax & Labor: We handle GST Registration & Return Filing, Professional Tax, PF, and ESI Registration.
Corporate Governance: Our team manages Annual Compliance for LLPs and Pvt Ltd Companies, DIR-3 KYC Filing, and INC-20A Filing.
Accounting: We offer end-to-end Accounting & Bookkeeping services to keep your financials audit-ready.
05. Other Essential Registrations

We truly are a one-stop shop. Need an Import Export Code (IEC) to ship spices to Europe? We do that. Need FSSAI Registration for your bakery? We handle that. We also provide Digital Signature Certificates (DSC), Udyam (MSME) Registration, and Barcode Registration for retail products.
06. Business Transformation

As your business evolves, so do your legal needs. We assist with Changing Entity Types (e.g., converting a Partnership to an LLP or Pvt Ltd), Changing Master Data (Address, Directors, Capital), and even Winding Up entities (Closing LLPs/OPCs) efficiently when it's time to move on.
The BookMyTM Promise: "Hassle-Free" Is Our Mantra
We know that legal processes in India can feel intimidating. Our mission is to strip away the complexity.
1. 100% Online & Digital
You should not have to run around government offices or wait in line at a lawyer's chamber. With BookMyTM, the entire process—from document submission to certification—is digital.
2. Transparent Pricing
We hate hidden fees. Our pricing structure is clear, upfront, and inclusive of government fees and professional charges. No surprises.
3. Expert-Led Process
We are technology-driven, but human-led. Your application isn't just processed by a bot; it is reviewed by qualified professionals to ensure errors are caught before filing.
4. Proactive Communication
We don't just file and forget. Whether it’s a Trademark Watch Service or GST reminders, we keep you informed at every step.
Our Vision for the Future

We envision an India where Intellectual Property is not just the domain of the elite but a fundamental right of every small business owner. We see a Kerala where every "Thattukada" with a unique name has a registered Trademark, and every tech startup has an ISO 27001 certificate on its wall.

At BookMyTM, we are not just protecting names; we are protecting dreams. We are protecting the legacy you are building for your family. We are protecting the innovation that will define India’s future.
Join thousands of satisfied business owners who have entrusted their identity to us.
BookMyTM — Expert Advice. Seamless Execution. Total Protection.
